scripts.copy:assets: xcopy src\images dist\images /E /I /Y /Q && xcopy src\music dist\music /E /I /Y /Q && xcopy src\js dist\js /E /I /Y /Q && copy index-sound-engineer.html dist\index.html /Y
scripts.build: npm run copy:assets && sass src/scss/main.scss dist/css/main.css --style=compressed --no-source-map
scripts.build:dev: npm run copy:assets && sass src/scss/main.scss dist/css/main.css --style=expanded
scripts.watch: npm run copy:assets && sass src/scss/main.scss dist/css/main.css --style=expanded --watch
